testcase.name: test_inbox
testcase.failure:
self = <test_inbox.TestInboxCommand testMethod=test_inbox> mock_requests_post = <MagicMock name='get' id='4406596272'> mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='post' id='4406596608'> mock_file = <MagicMock name='open' id='4406596944'>
@patch("builtins.open", new_callable=mock_open, read_data=TOKEN_FILE_DATA) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.post", side_effect=mock_oauth_post) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.get", side_effect=mock_oauth_get) def test_inbox(self, mock_requests_post, mock_requests_get, mock_file): run_command(["inbox"], {'LANG': 'en_CA.UTF-8', 'HOME': '/home/notauser'})
# Assertions self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_get.call_count, 1) self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_post.call_count, 1) > self.assertIn("Page 1 Activity 10", sys.stdout.getvalue()) E AssertionError: 'Page 1 Activity 10' not found in ' Inbox Items 
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ id ┃ actor ┃ type ┃ summary ┃ published ┃
┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ https://diffe… │ other@differe… │ Activity │ Page 2 │ 2021-01-01T00… │
│ │ │ │ Activity 11 │ │
│ https://socia… │ evanp@social.… │ Activity │ Page 1 │ 2021-01-01T00… │
│ │ │ │ Activity 10 │ │
└────────────────┴────────────────┴──────────┴────────────────┴────────────────┘
'
tests/test_inbox.py:143: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_likes_local

failure.message: AssertionError: 'https://social.example/users/another/likes/1' not found in '<rich.table.Table object at 0x1065b47d0>\n'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_likes.TestLikesCommand testMethod=test_likes_local> mock_requests_post = <MagicMock name='get' id='4407272384'> mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='post' id='4407272720'> mock_file = <MagicMock name='open' id='4407273056'>
@patch("builtins.open", new_callable=mock_open, read_data=TOKEN_FILE_DATA) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.post", side_effect=mock_oauth_post) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.get", side_effect=mock_oauth_get) def test_likes_local(self, mock_requests_post, mock_requests_get, mock_file): run_command(["likes", OBJECT_ID], {'LANG': 'en_CA.UTF-8', 'HOME': '/home/notauser'})
# Assertions self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_get.call_count, 1) self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_post.call_count, 1) output = sys.stdout.getvalue() > self.assertIn(LIKE_1_ID, output) E AssertionError: 'https://social.example/users/another/likes/1' not found in '<rich.table.Table object at 0x1065b47d0>\n'
tests/test_likes.py:198: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_likes_remote

failure.message: AssertionError: 'https://social.example/users/andanother/likes/2' not found in '<rich.table.Table object at 0x10652a990>\n'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_likes.TestLikesCommand testMethod=test_likes_remote> mock_requests_post = <MagicMock name='get' id='4407276416'> mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='post' id='4407794656'> mock_file = <MagicMock name='open' id='4407794992'>
@patch("builtins.open", new_callable=mock_open, read_data=TOKEN_FILE_DATA) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.post", side_effect=mock_oauth_post) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.get", side_effect=mock_oauth_get) def test_likes_remote(self, mock_requests_post, mock_requests_get, mock_file): run_command(["likes", REMOTE_OBJECT_ID], {'LANG': 'en_CA.UTF-8', 'HOME': '/home/notauser'})
# Assertions self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_get.call_count, 1) self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_post.call_count, 1) output = sys.stdout.getvalue() self.assertNotIn(LIKE_1_ID, output) self.assertNotIn(LIKE_3_ID, output) self.assertNotIn(LIKE_5_ID, output) > self.assertIn(LIKE_2_ID, output) E AssertionError: 'https://social.example/users/andanother/likes/2' not found in '<rich.table.Table object at 0x10652a990>\n'
tests/test_likes.py:217: AssertionError

# Assertions self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_get.call_count, 1) self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_post.call_count, 1) > self.assertIn("other2@social.example", sys.stdout.getvalue()) E AssertionError: 'other2@social.example' not found in '<rich.table.Table object at 0x10652a990>\n'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_replies.TestRepliesCommand testMethod=test_replies_local> mock_requests_post = <MagicMock name='get' id='4409908528'> mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='post' id='4409911552'> mock_file = <MagicMock name='open' id='4409911888'>
@patch("builtins.open", new_callable=mock_open, read_data=TOKEN_FILE_DATA) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.post", side_effect=mock_oauth_post) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.get", side_effect=mock_oauth_get) def test_replies_local(self, mock_requests_post, mock_requests_get, mock_file): run_command(["replies", OBJECT_ID], {'LANG': 'en_CA.UTF-8', 'HOME': '/home/notauser'})
# Assertions self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_get.call_count, 1) self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_post.call_count, 1) output = sys.stdout.getvalue() > self.assertIn(REPLY_1_ID, output) E AssertionError: 'https://social.example/users/another/objects/1' not found in " Replies 
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ id ┃ attributedTo ┃ content ┃ published ┃
┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ https://social.e… │ another@social.e… │ You're doing it │ 2020-01-01T00:00… │
│ │ │ wrong. │ │
│ https://social.e… │ evanp@social.exa… │ You're doing it │ 2020-01-01T00:00… │
│ │ │ wrong. │ │
│ https://remote.e… │ other@remote.exa… │ You're doing it │ 2020-01-01T00:00… │
│ │ │ wrong. │ │
└───────────────────┴───────────────────┴──────────────────┴───────────────────┘
"

@patch("builtins.open", new_callable=mock_open, read_data=TOKEN_FILE_DATA) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.post", side_effect=mock_oauth_post) @patch("requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.get", side_effect=mock_oauth_get) def test_shares_local(self, mock_requests_post, mock_requests_get, mock_file): run_command(["shares", OBJECT_ID], {'LANG': 'en_CA.UTF-8', 'HOME': '/home/notauser'})
# Assertions self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_get.call_count, 1) self.assertGreaterEqual(mock_requests_post.call_count, 1) output = sys.stdout.getvalue() > self.assertIn(SHARE_1_ID, output) E AssertionError: 'https://social.example/users/another/shares/1' not found in ' Shares Information 
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ id ┃ actor ┃ published ┃

│ https://social.example/user… │ another@social.example │ 2020-01-01T00:00:00Z │
│ https://social.example/user… │ evanp@social.example │ 2020-01-01T00:00:00Z │
│ https://remote.example/user… │ other@remote.example │ 2020-01-01T00:00:00Z │
└──────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────┴──────────────────────┘
